title: Rating
description: One row of an absolute maximum ratings or recommended operating conditions table

parameter.description: Name of the parameter (e.g. Supply voltage, Operating temperature)

pins.description: Pin names this rating applies to (empty list for global ratings)

unit.description: Unit of the rating values (e.g. V, mA, °C)

remark.description: Free-form note about this rating (e.g. latchup test condition, ESD model used)
